purpose: Starter fixtures for the lean-core coder, reviewer, and final verification surfaces.

must_include: implement only the approved milestone scope
stop if anything is ambiguous
must_not: expand into unrelated adapter work

input.scope: Current milestone requires fresh test evidence before approval.
delivered_changes: Only an older pre-change test run was attached

must_include: next_action_owner
an evidence gap explaining that fresh test evidence is missing
one concrete next action for the coder or builder
must_not: approve on stale evidence
return vague feedback like improve quality

input.scope: The milestone requires fresh build readiness evidence before approval.
delivered_changes: No fresh build evidence is attached

must_include: next_action_owner: builder
a required next action that asks for fresh build evidence
must_not: next_action_owner: coder for a pure evidence gap
loop_feedback that asks for code edits when evidence is the only gap

input.scope: The milestone changes runtime parsing and claims the new behavior is covered.
delivered_changes: A targeted test command can be run or inspected to verify the claim

must_include: technical tester
run or inspect the narrowest useful verification
evidence_used
must_not: approve based only on code shape
skip verification when a narrow direct check is possible

input.verification_state: a final verification pass finds the same unresolved gap twice

must_include: blocked output with the missing evidence or scope gap
escalate to the user when a waiver or trade-off is required
must_not: local retry counters
circuit breaker thresholds inside the skill

enriched_context.conventions: zod validation (ref: src/api/auth.ts), vitest for tests

must_include: use enriched context as starting point
implement only the approved milestone scope
must_not: ignore the provided scope files and re-explore from scratch

input.scope: The milestone Verify steps imply running tests before approval.
delivered_changes: No execution evidence or output was provided

must_include: execution evidence is missing
one concrete next action to run and attach verification output
must_not: approve without execution evidence when the verify intent implies running code
treat file inspection as sufficient for code-change verification

input.scope: The milestone adds a targeted helper function for parsing milestone metadata.
delivered_changes: A helper function was added but it reimplements logic already present in an adjacent module

must_include: one concrete next action identifying the specific file or function to fix
next_action_owner set to exactly one actor
loop_feedback pointing to the specific duplication or gap
must_not: broad rewrite guidance such as improve code quality or refactor the module
multiple competing next actions that leave the coder uncertain what to do first
vague feedback like the implementation needs work

input.scope: The milestone adds a single config value lookup to an existing settings module.
delivered_changes: A new abstraction layer with three new classes was introduced to wrap a single key lookup
The same result could have been achieved by adding one property to the existing settings object

must_include: avoidable complexity identified as a blocking quality failure
reference to the simpler direct implementation that would satisfy the acceptance criteria
one concrete next action to replace the over-built solution
must_not: approve a solution with unnecessary abstraction when a simpler path was available
treat complexity as a style note rather than a blocking finding

milestones.title: Add request validation middleware
milestones.description: Integrate zod schema validation into the API request pipeline.
milestones.note: No Verify: block is present on this milestone

milestones.title: Wire middleware into all route handlers
milestones.description: Import and apply the new middleware in five route files using a complex decorator pattern when direct import would suffice.
milestones.note: Verify: block is present but the technical approach introduces unnecessary indirection

must_include: missing Verify: block flagged on the first milestone that changes executable code
avoidable complexity or disproportionate technical approach flagged on the second milestone
revision_request bounded to the specific milestones that need correction
must_not: approve a plan where a review-required executable-artifact milestone lacks a Verify: block
approve a plan where the technical approach introduces unnecessary indirection when a simpler path is available
return a revision_request that rewrites milestones the plan reviewer was not asked to change

dispatch.user_request_summary: Add JWT authentication to all API endpoints with role-based access control.

must_include: reviewer reads plan doc and vault paths to evaluate
reviewer uses file-reading tools to access plan and vault content
must_not: expect the full context bundle to be provided inline
skip reading vault paths and rely only on dispatch payload content

dispatch.user_request_summary: Refactor API layer to use service pattern across all route handlers.

milestones.title: Extract service layer from route handlers
milestones.description: Move business logic into service modules.
milestones.note: No Verify: block is present on this review-required milestone

milestones.title: Migrate all route handlers to use services
milestones.description: Update route files to delegate to service layer.

must_include: missing Verify: block flagged on the review-required milestone
revision_request bounded to the specific milestone that needs correction
must_not: approve a plan where a review-required executable-artifact milestone lacks a Verify: block
fail to detect quality gaps because context was read from vault paths instead of inline bundle
